goal: Migrate TASK-REGISTRY.xml from single-file XML to per-task files under .planning/tasks/<id>.{json|md} via phased dual-write. Closes multi-agent race class. Decision 2026-04-20 D3.
resolution: Close-out sweep: per-task JSON at .planning/tasks/<id>.json is sole source of truth per CLAUDE.md (task 63-53, 2026-04-22). Legacy TASK-REGISTRY.xml retired. gad tasks add/update/stamp/promote all operate on JSON. Migration complete.
